overall.description: A third-person perspective follows an armored character in a white cloak walking along a foggy forest path at night. The scene features atmospheric volumetric lighting from vintage street lamps piercing through dense mist, creating a moody, cinematic game environment reminiscent of Elden Ring.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy forest path with distant vintage street lamps

agents.ego_description: cloaked character walking steadily along the foggy dirt path toward the glowing street lamps in the distance

entered.detail: dark wooden signpost with rectangular board at path edge
tall cast-iron street lamp emitting warm orange light through the fog
dense bare trees with thick trunks lining the path
dense bare trees with thick trunks lining the path
low stone curb separating the path from the forest floor
wet dirt and gravel trail with visible puddles reflecting light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the cloaked character standing near a wooden signpost on a narrow, fog-shrouded forest path. The character walks forward steadily as vintage street lamps glow warmly in the distance through the dense mist. Tall bare trees create an enclosed canopy overhead, while a stone curb lines the right side of the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: close proximity to street lamp on foggy forest path

events.description: character enters the warm glow of the street lamp, increasing illumination and reducing local fog density
character stops forward progress and executes a turn to face back toward the camera

agents.ego_description: character passes the street lamp, continues several steps, then turns around to face the direction they came from

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past the first street lamp, which now dominates the right side of the frame with its intense warm glow cutting through the fog. Wet ground reflections become more pronounced in the lamplight. After passing the lamp, the character turns around, revealing the front of their ornate armor and flowing white cloak as they face back toward the camera's position.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a misty forest path that shifts from a distant, atmospheric approach to an intimate reveal of the character. It begins with the cloaked figure standing by a wooden signpost, moving steadily forward through a dense fog beneath a canopy of bare trees and along a stone-lined dirt trail. As the character advances, the scene is increasingly dominated by the intense, warm glow of a vintage street lamp that casts sharp light through the mist and creates vivid reflections on the wet ground. The camera continues to track the movement past the lamp before the character turns around, finally bringing the ornate armor and flowing white cloak into full view as they face the lens.
